headlines.title: Iran war live: Qatar’s PM meets US envoys; Tehran holds firm on conditions
headlines.snippet: Iran states that hostilities must end in Lebanon and frozen Iranian funds must be released before talks on a final deal can begin. Qatar's Prime Minister has met with US envoys.

headlines.title: ‘A rally like none other’: Trump unveils 2026 Republican midterm convention
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump has announced the first Republican national convention before the 2026 US midterm elections, where the Republican Party aims to keep control of both chambers of Congress.

headlines.title: Donald Trump reports $1.4bn in cryptocurrency income in government filing
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump has reported earning $1.4 billion in cryptocurrency income on a government filing. He has introduced crypto-friendly policies since beginning his second term.

headlines.title: Venezuelans the US deported hours before earthquakes still missing
headlines.snippet: Venezuelans deported by the US just hours before two deadly earthquakes struck last Wednesday are still missing. At least 146 individuals were sent back to Venezuela.

headlines.title: “WhatsApp Privacy Changes”
headlines.snippet: WhatsApp is introducing usernames to protect users' phone numbers and enhance privacy.

headlines.title: Vance says oil traffic through Strait of Hormuz has returned to pre-war levels
headlines.snippet: Vance stated that oil traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has returned to pre-war levels, with some days seeing more oil output than before the conflict began. He noted this indicates a global economic recovery.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Gaza security force says tactical vehicles have arrived near Strip
headlines.snippet: The Trump-backed Board of Peace has reported the arrival of the first tactical vehicles at the International Security Force base near Gaza. This is part of the logistical preparations for a multinational force deployment in the enclave.

headlines.title: Israel delays withdrawal from two southern Lebanon villages, report says
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces' planned withdrawal from two villages in southern Lebanon has been postponed. The delay is pending an agreement on a US oversight mechanism and clear criteria for the Lebanese army to act against Hezbollah.

headlines.title: Israeli forces order closure of Nablus charity for one year
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces have raided the al-Tadamon Charitable Society in Nablus, in the occupied West Bank, and ordered its closure for one year. Military vehicles entered the area before raiding the headquarters.

headlines.title: Syria's president condemns Israeli attacks near Golan Heights
headlines.snippet: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa condemned Israeli attacks near the occupied Golan Heights, stating Syria is not a testing ground for foreign conspiracies. Residents near the Golan Heights were forced to flee their homes.

headlines.title: Vance Says ‘More Game to Play’ in Iran Negotiations
headlines.snippet: Vance indicated that there is "more game to play" in the ongoing negotiations with Iran.

headlines.snippet: Netanyahu stated that Israel will remain in southern Lebanon as long as Hezbollah poses a threat.

headlines.title: Syrian parliament set to announce Sharaa's pick of 70 MPs
headlines.snippet: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa is set to announce the selection of 70 Members of Parliament, after which the new legislature will commence debating and approving legislation.

headlines.title: Man arrested after arson attack on Dublin Islamic centre
headlines.snippet: A man has been arrested following an arson attack on an Islamic center in Dublin. The incident occurred after evening prayers, and no injuries were reported.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to end birthright citizenship
headlines.snippet: The US Supreme Court rejected Donald Trump's request to end birthright citizenship. Chief Justice John Roberts affirmed that children born in the US are citizens at birth.

headlines.title: Iran prepares for late supreme leader's funeral later this week
headlines.snippet: Iran is preparing for the funeral of its late supreme leader, Ayatollah Khamenei, later this week. Approximately 30 countries are expected to send representatives.

headlines.snippet: Israeli strikes on Gaza have set approximately 200 tents ablaze, despite a ceasefire, leaving thousands of people without shelter.
